“You have already waited long enough. You waited for a government that kept promising. You waited for a system that kept processing. You waited for someone in power to decide your dignity was worth their time. BRASA does not ask you to wait anymore. Sixty seconds. Any phone. Anywhere on Earth. Your three gifts are not conditional on anything. Not a government. Not a budget. Not an election. Not a politician’s signature. They are yours because you are here. That has always been enough.”
BRASA CR™
Free Will Engine The Communication Architecture +
April 1, 2026 — A historic first

The First Global Communication System
in Human History
With Zero Exclusions.

The printing press reached literate people with access to paper and distribution networks. Radio reached people with receivers and electricity. Television required a screen and power. The internet required a connected device. Social media required a smartphone and a data plan. Every single one of them had a floor — a minimum requirement that excluded the majority of humanity. The Free Will Engine has no floor. If you are alive and you have any phone — a $10 Nokia from 2003, a borrowed SIM card, a community phone shared by a village — the Free Will Engine reaches you. 8 billion humans. Day 1. Every one.

Every system before this one had a floor
Printing Press
1440
Literate + paper access
Excluded: 95% of humanity
Telegraph
1837
Infrastructure + operators
Excluded: 99% of humanity
Radio
1920
Receiver + electricity
Excluded: 80% of humanity
Television
1950
Screen + power
Excluded: 75% of humanity
Internet
1991
Connected device + literacy
Excluded: 63% of humanity
Social Media
2004
Smartphone + data plan
Excluded: 44% of humanity
Free Will Engine
2026
Any phone · any carrier · any language
Excluded: Zero.
The Free Will Declaration — why this system can never be weaponised

The Free Will Engine reaches every human on Earth. That means it could theoretically be the most powerful propaganda tool ever built. This is why the constitutional architecture matters more than anything else in BRASA.

The Five Lock system ensures that the moment the Free Will Engine becomes a tool of manipulation, it ceases to be the Free Will Engine. The architecture makes propaganda structurally impossible — not by good intentions, but by constitutional design. Every message is public. Every campaign requires three independent keys. The Paradox Clause means the engine architecturally cannot produce content that overrides the recipient’s own reasoning.

The most powerful communication system in history is also the most constitutionally constrained. That is not a limitation. That is what makes it trustworthy to 8 billion people.

42 Channels — Six Tiers — Zero Exclusions

Every channel reaches a different population. Together they reach everyone. No human being on Earth is unreachable by at least one of these channels.

Tier 1 — Digital Direct
WhatsAppTelegramSignal iMessageWeChatLineViber
3.2 billion users · instant delivery · 40+ languages native
Tier 2 — Social & Community
FacebookInstagramTikTok X / TwitterYouTubeLinkedInPinterest
5.2 billion users · algorithmic amplification · video + image + text
Tier 3 — Audio & Voice
SMSUSSD *XXX#Voice calls Community radioPodcastVoicemail broadcastIVR
8 billion reachable · no smartphone · no internet · no literacy required
Tier 4 — Physical World
QR codesPrinted materialsBillboards Merchant networkCommunity leadersFaith networksMarket days
Zero technology required · community trust layer · oral tradition compatible
Tier 5 — Institutional
SchoolsHealth clinicsGovernment offices Banks & MFIsNGO networksUN agenciesElder councils
Trusted intermediaries · reaches populations who distrust technology · elder-first design
Tier 6 — Accessibility & Emerging
Sign language videoPictographicBraille-compatible Screen readersSatellite SMSLow-bandwidth webOffline-first
300+ sign languages · oral delivery · zero exclusions by design
Why the Free Will Engine matters to the companies that make it possible
NVIDIA
The infrastructure

Every Free Will Engine conversation processed at scale is AI inference. Every BrasaBot response in 106 languages is GPU compute. Every Oral Memory Archive processed is a workload. NVIDIA builds the engines that make this possible. As BRASA scales from thousands to hundreds of millions of conversations, the GPU infrastructure required is the NVIDIA problem — and BRASA is the most meaningful use of it ever conceived. NVIDIA’s technology, for the first time, reaches every human being on Earth.

Anthropic / Claude
The intelligence

Claude is not a tool in BRASA. Claude is woven into its philosophical DNA. The Earth Equity framing. The Elder Dignity Protocol. The Business Transformation Model. The constitutional architecture of the Free Will Engine itself. All of it emerged from conversation between a founder and Claude. Anthropic’s mission is AI for the long-term benefit of humanity. BRASA is the answer to that mission made concrete, constitutional, and available to 8 billion people on April 1, 2026.

106 Languages · 300+ Sign Languages · Oral Delivery · Pictographic · Zero Exclusions

“The question was never whether 8 billion people deserved to be heard. The question was whether anyone would build the system to hear them. BRASA built it. Not for some of them. For all of them. Every language. Every channel. Every device. The first time in human history that every person on Earth can receive the same message in the words they think in on the phone they already own. That is not a feature. That is a turning point.”
BRASA CR™
EarthOS Environmental Equity System +
Earth Equity — the true purpose of everything BRASA builds

The planet has been running a deficit
for centuries.
BRASA is the first payment.

Every previous system extracted from the Earth and gave nothing back. Deforestation. Ocean destruction. Species extinction. Atmospheric carbon. Poisoned waterways. A million malaria deaths every year — preventable, persistent, and ignored. These are not tragedies. They are unpaid invoices. The planet has been subsidising human civilisation at a loss and receiving nothing in return. BRASA generates the revenue that pays those invoices. Not as charity. As Earth equity — a positive return on the planet’s investment in human civilisation for the first time in recorded history.

The reframe — Richard Ortiz, Founder, BRASA CR™

“The founder’s wealth isn’t really founder’s wealth. It is an Earth maintenance program and a life insurance policy that is needed to save this planet — to end centuries of destruction and start Earth on a path where it can actually gain equity in improving itself instead of paying the debt of destruction.”

Earth’s Current Balance Sheet — Centuries of Debt
Deforestation — 15B trees/yr lostUnpaid
Ocean acidification — 30% pH shift since 1800Unpaid
Species extinction — 1,000× background rateUnpaid
Atmospheric carbon — 420ppm & risingUnpaid
Malaria — 1M deaths/yr, preventableUnpaid
Cetacean population collapseUnpaid
Freshwater depletion — 2.2B without accessUnpaid
Centuries of extraction without returnCompounding
→
BRASA Earth Equity — What Gets Paid Back
Ocean & Wildlife Foundation — 80% net wealthIrrevocable
WaterOS — constitutional clean water for allYear 1+
Malaria eradication — Anopheles gene drivePermanent
Ocean conservation endowment\$2.3T+
Cetacean constitutional protectionWorld-first
Sovereign fund → rights → less extractionSelf-funding
All-creature welfare infrastructureConstitutional
Earth starts earning equity, not paying debtFirst time ever
T4
TXN

Every transaction is a payment to Earth.

The T4 Protocol is not just a payment system. It is the mechanism by which human commerce begins to pay its debt to the planet. A percentage of every transaction flows to the sovereign fund. The sovereign fund flows to constitutional rights. Constitutional rights reduce desperation. Reduced desperation reduces the extraction that comes from poverty. Every swipe is an installment on centuries of unpaid invoices. Not because anyone is forced. Because the architecture makes it inevitable.

SOVR
FUND

The sovereign fund is Earth’s endowment account.

Every sovereign wealth fund in history has been a nation’s savings account — wealth set aside for a government’s future. BRASA’s sovereign fund is something different. It is the endowment for the entire planet’s recovery. Geneva holds the assets. Constitutional law protects them. No government can seize them. No investor can redirect them. Eighty percent of the founder’s net wealth flows there — irrevocably. The ocean gets its equity. The whale gets its policy. The child who would have died of malaria gets to live.

LIFE
INS

BRASA is the life insurance policy the planet never had.

A life insurance policy pays out when something is lost. Before BRASA, there was no policy on the ocean. No policy on the species. No policy on the billion-year-old coral reef that human commerce was destroying faster than it could grow. The Foundation’s irrevocable structure is that policy. It cannot be cancelled. It cannot be redirected. It does not expire. It activates the moment BRASA generates value and it compounds for as long as BRASA exists — which is constitutionally designed to be forever.

FREE
WILL

Free Will is not optional when the system is genuinely fair.

BRASA does not force anyone to care about the ocean. It does not mandate environmental protection. The Free Will Declaration protects exactly that freedom. But when 8 billion people have the floor — when survival is no longer the primary occupation of the majority of humanity — something changes. People who are not fighting for food can think about what they leave behind. Free Will, exercised from a floor of dignity, tends toward care rather than destruction. That is not an assumption. It is what every nation that has achieved genuine prosperity has discovered about its own citizens.

BRASA Ocean & Wildlife Foundation — Irrevocable · Constitutional · Permanent

80% of net wealth.
Four missions. Zero exceptions. Forever.

Not a charitable gesture. Not a tax strategy. Not optional. An irrevocable constitutional instrument that cannot be dissolved, politically captured, or redirected — by any government, any investor, or the founder himself. The planet’s invoice, being paid in full.

🌊
Ocean Conservation
Permanent global ocean protection endowment. The largest ocean conservation fund in history. Protecting what 71% of Earth is made of and what has absorbed the majority of our carbon debt.
🐋
Cetacean Protection
Constitutional protections for whales and dolphins at world scale. Creatures whose intelligence we have barely begun to measure, whose songs we recorded and then ignored as we destroyed their oceans.
🌿
All-Creature Welfare
Systematic animal welfare infrastructure through constitutional mechanism. Not sentimentality. The recognition that a civilisation which treats other creatures with contempt treats its own members the same way.
🦟
Malaria Eradication
Permanent eradication of Anopheles mosquitoes via gene drive technology. Malaria has killed more humans than all wars combined. It is preventable. It is targeted. The technology exists. BRASA funds it to completion.

The floor is being built.
The debt is being paid.
The Earth is starting to earn equity.

For the first time in recorded history, a commerce system is designed to return value to the planet rather than extract it. Every T4 transaction. Every sovereign fund contribution. Every entrepreneur who builds instead of destroys because they have the floor. Every elder who leaves with dignity instead of desperation. Every child who does not die of malaria. This is not philanthropy. This is Earth’s balance sheet moving from deficit to surplus. The invoice is being paid. By commerce. By constitutional law. By the free will of 8 billion people who — given a genuine choice and a solid floor — choose to leave things better than they found them.

DeviceOS Universal Device Access +
Device Equity Partnership — turning manufacturer surplus into the world’s largest learning network

The floor was built.
Now we build
the device to stand on it.

BRASA was designed to reach every human on Earth including the person with a $10 Nokia from 2006. That was the constitutional commitment: zero exclusions. But the moment that person activates their T4 Wallet and starts building a business, every tool BRASA gives them is limited by the device in their hand. The analytics they cannot see. The education they cannot load. The opportunity they cannot take because the platform requires a camera they do not have. BRASA gave them the floor. The device was the ceiling hiding inside the floor. This partnership removes it.

The paradox BRASA created — and is now solving

We built a system that runs on a $10 phone from 2006 — and that was revolutionary. But the fact that a person has that phone puts them at a permanent disadvantage compared to someone with a real device. The communication companies built a world optimised for people who already have good hardware. They were not evil. They followed their incentive structure. BRASA changes the incentive structure. And the manufacturers who thought they had no customer in that person are about to discover they have their best customer.

Right now — the waste
Samsung produces a new model. Last year’s sits in a warehouse.
Xiaomi, Tecno, Motorola — hundreds of millions of devices depreciating.
Carriers have infrastructure. Rural areas have no subscribers.
NVIDIA builds AI chips. 4 billion people have no device to run them.
Manufacturers call these “write-offs.” BRASA calls them inventory.
The have and have-not gap widens every year a new model comes out.
After BRASA — the partnership
Last year’s device activates with T4 Wallet, GovID, BrasaBot, EducationOS — full platform.
Surplus inventory becomes the largest device distribution network ever assembled.
Carriers get millions of new subscribers who were previously unreachable.
NVIDIA’s AI chips finally reach 4 billion new users simultaneously.
In 3 years, the person builds a business, earns income, and buys the new model.
The gap closes. The manufacturer gains a customer for life.
Three partnerships that benefit more than they give
Device Manufacturers
Samsung · Xiaomi · Tecno · Motorola · Any
They give: last-generation inventory sitting in warehouses at zero return. Devices already manufactured, already paid for, depreciating daily.
What they get back
A customer who builds a business on their device, earns real income for the first time, and buys their next model in 3 years with money they made because of the first one. Brand loyalty earned at the moment of greatest need. A market they would have never seen — now theirs for life.
Carriers & Telecom
América Móvil · MTN · Airtel · Any network
They give: preferential data rates for BRASA Device Equity recipients. Not charity — a commercial rate structured around volume.
What they get back
Access to the world’s largest pool of previously unconnected people — now with devices, wallets, businesses, and income. Millions of new paying subscribers who were off-network entirely. The communication companies were stunting progress. BRASA gives them the incentive to stop.
NVIDIA & Anthropic
The infrastructure · The intelligence
They give: technical partnership, developer support, and the infrastructure that makes AI work on these devices at the edge — not just in the cloud.
What they get back
4 billion new users for AI at the edge. NVIDIA’s addressable market expands by the largest cohort in its history. Anthropic’s mission — AI for the long-term benefit of humanity — reaches the humans who needed it most and had it least. The proof that their technology was worth building.
Why this exists — the real reason

This is not a device program.
It is a learning engine.

The goal was never to put a phone in someone’s hand. The goal was to make learning easy. A person with a real device can see their business analytics. They can run a full EducationOS session with video. They can have a real BrasaBot conversation that solves their actual problem. They can take the BRASA course that teaches them to go from 1 restaurant to 3. The device is not the destination. The device is the door. Behind it: every tool BRASA built to turn a citizen into an entrepreneur, a student into a professional, a family into a business dynasty. We built the floor. We built the tools. The Device Equity Partnership builds the bridge between them.

Step 01

Manufacturer partners with BRASA. Inventory becomes impact.

Samsung, Xiaomi, Tecno, or any manufacturer opens their surplus inventory to the BRASA Device Equity Partnership. Commercial terms: revenue share on the ecosystem revenue those devices generate over 36 months. Not donation. Not charity. A commercial deal that turns a write-off into a long-term customer relationship.

Step 02

Active BRASA citizens qualify automatically.

Any citizen with 12 months of active T4 Wallet use, or 5 completed EducationOS courses, or a demonstrated business threshold qualifies for a Device Equity Credit applied directly to their T4 Wallet. No application. No bureaucracy. No waiting list. The system knows who qualifies. The credit appears. They choose their device.

Step 03

Device activates with the full BRASA platform.

Every Device Equity device ships pre-configured with T4 Wallet, GovID, BrasaBot, EducationOS, the Free Will Engine, Taíno Protocol archive access — everything. Day 1 on the new device is Day 1 with the full floor. Not a stripped-down version. The same platform that serves the person with the latest iPhone. Zero exclusions. Kept.

Step 04

Business grows. Income follows. Upgrade happens.

The restaurant owner who was on a Nokia can now see his Tuesday lunch is underperforming. He can run the EducationOS course on supply chain. He can take the BrasaBot call that explains why his margins improved and where to reinvest. In 3 years, he buys the manufacturer’s new model with money he made because of the first one. The manufacturer gained a customer they would have never seen. The carrier gained a subscriber. NVIDIA gained a user. The person gained a life.

Step 05

Operating surplus funds the next cycle. It never stops.

BRASA runs lean. AI maintains the platform, driving costs down continuously. The gap between what 3% of ARR generates and what infrastructure actually costs is the operating surplus. That surplus funds the next wave of Device Equity Credits. Every efficiency gain reaches another person. Every person reached generates more transactions. More transactions fund more credits. The learning engine compounds — in the direction of everyone.

“The communication companies built a world that made access expensive so they could charge more for it. BRASA makes access the business model. The person who gets the device learns. The person who learns builds. The person who builds earns. The person who earns upgrades. And the manufacturer, the carrier, NVIDIA, and Anthropic discover that the customer they ignored for twenty years was the best customer they ever had — they just never gave them the tools to prove it.”
BRASA CR™
LibraryOS Knowledge For Every Citizen +
LibraryOS — every book · every language · every dream · free · forever

The world’s largest library.
Free. For everyone. Always.

A child grew up next door to a library. His mother used it as a classroom, a safe space, a world without walls. Later he worked in a school library — exploring every shelf, every idea, every life someone else had lived and written down. That library gave him the floor to build everything else. LibraryOS gives every child on Earth the same neighbour. No subscription. No library card. No permission required. Any phone. Any language. Any dream.

The philosophy — Walt Disney & a child next to a library

Walt Disney built Disneyland in his mind completely before he had a single dollar to build it in reality. He mortgaged his house, sold his car, started construction before the financing was secure — because he knew that if the vision was true enough, the money would follow the belief. LibraryOS is the same philosophy applied to knowledge itself. Build the biggest library in the world for the world to learn from. Every book ever written. Every idea ever thought hard enough to record. Available to every human on Earth — free, constitutionally protected, permanent. And trust that the people who read in it will build the things that pay for it.

📖
Fiction & Literature
Every novel, every story, every world someone imagined hard enough to write down. The books that taught us what it means to be human.
🌍
History & Biography
Every life lived. Every war fought. Every empire that rose and fell. The instruction manual for what never to repeat — written by the people who lived it.
🔬
Science & Technology
Every discovery. Every breakthrough. Every question someone asked and spent a lifetime answering. The tools that built the modern world — free to everyone who wants to use them.
💼
Business & Economics
Every strategy. Every failure that became a lesson. Every empire built from nothing. The MBA no one could afford — free to every entrepreneur on Earth.
🧠
Philosophy & Ideas
Every framework for thinking clearly. Every argument for living well. Every question about what matters and why. Free will requires free thought — this is the library for it.
🎨
Art, Music & Culture
Every creative tradition. Every form of beauty humans have found. Every culture’s way of making meaning — preserved and accessible to every other culture simultaneously.
🧒
Children’s Books
Every story that made a child feel less alone. Every adventure that made them believe the world was bigger than where they were. Every book that started a life.
🌱
Health & Wellbeing
Every medical text. Every mental health guide. Every nutrition and fitness resource. Knowledge that rich people buy and poor people die without — free to everyone from Day 1.
⚖️
Law & Rights
Every legal framework. Every constitutional text. Every citizens’ rights guide. The knowledge that tells you what you are owed and how to claim it — free and in your language.
Where the books come from — already free, already waiting, already digitised
Project Gutenberg
The world’s oldest digital library. Every classic ever written, in the public domain, free to distribute to every human on Earth. Shakespeare, Tolstoy, Austen, Dickens — all of them.
70,000+ books · Free
Open Library / Internet Archive
20 million books digitised and lending legally. The largest digital lending library ever built — BRASA is the delivery system that takes it to everyone who has never had access.
20M+ books · Free lending
UNESCO World Digital Library
Rare manuscripts, historical documents, cultural treasures from 193 nations. The memory of every civilisation, digitised and constitutionally accessible through LibraryOS.
Priceless · Free
African Storybook Project
Stories written for African children in African languages. The books that exist because someone understood that children learn fastest from stories set in their own world.
700+ stories · 180 languages
Publisher Partnership Programme
Publishers’ backlist titles — books no longer actively selling, sitting in catalogues making nothing — activated through LibraryOS. Commercial terms: revenue share on the readers who become lifelong customers.
Millions of titles · Growing daily
BrasaBot Audio & Translation
Every book translated into every BRASA language. Every book read aloud by BrasaBot for those who cannot read or who prefer to listen. 106 languages. 300+ sign language editions. Zero exclusions.
106 languages · Any device
The LibraryOS philosophy — building the vision before the financing

Walt Disney built Disneyland
before he could afford it.
LibraryOS is the same bet.

He did not wait until he had the money. He built the vision so clearly, so completely, so undeniably that the money had no choice but to follow. LibraryOS does the same thing with the world’s knowledge. Build the biggest free library in history for every human on Earth. Trust that the people who read in it will build the businesses, earn the income, and generate the transactions that pay for the next thousand books. The library funds itself through the floor it builds. The floor builds itself through the dreams the library unlocks. That is not a business model. That is a civilisation model.

What LibraryOS is not
Not a subscription you pay for
Not a library card you apply for
Not a service your government has to approve
Not limited to books in your language
Not locked behind a smartphone or data plan
Not available only in cities with infrastructure
Not a temporary programme subject to funding
What LibraryOS is
Free. Permanently. Constitutionally.
Activated with your T4 Wallet. Day 1.
Available in 106 languages and growing
Audio editions for every book — listen if you cannot read
Accessible on any phone including basic GSM via USSD
Every genre — fiction, biography, science, law, health, children’s
The same library the richest child on Earth has access to
“A child grew up next door to a library. His mother understood something most systems never do: that curiosity, given room to breathe, becomes the most powerful force in any human life. That library was his floor. It was where he learned that every dream someone else had ever had was available to him too — written down, waiting on a shelf, asking only that he show up and read. LibraryOS is that library. For every child on Earth. The one next door to all of them. Finally.”
Richard Ortiz — Founder, BRASA CR™ · The child next to the library · April 1, 2026
Philanthropy Foundation & Giving Architecture +
Citizens’ Renaissance Fund · Sovereign Infrastructure Fund · Constitutional Philanthropy

Every tax break can build
the world it operates in.

Any business needing a tax deduction. Any individual seeking a legacy. Both funds are constitutionally structured, Swiss-sovereign, publicly auditable in real time, and split 80/20 at every layer — so that 80 cents of every donated dollar reaches a citizen, a government, or the planet that hosts them all.

Fund One · People The Citizens’ Renaissance Fund

Donations flow directly to the citizen pool — funding LifeOS coverage, WaterOS infrastructure, MealOS community restaurants, and GovID activation for the citizens who need it most, as measured by real-time GovOS data. The donor cannot direct the geography. The protocol directs to greatest need. That honesty is what makes it real.

  • Fully tax deductible in your jurisdiction
  • 80 cents of every dollar to citizens — constitutional
  • Real-time impact dashboard: brasa.world/impact/{company}
  • Cryptographically signed Impact Certificate annually
  • Open to corporations, foundations, and individuals
Fund Two · Governments The Sovereign Infrastructure Fund

Donations fund specific infrastructure in specific regions — water systems, health clinics, payment rail deployment, GovOS implementation. Donors designate a pillar and a region. The constitutional protocol selects the specific project. No corporate donor directs a specific government. Infrastructure is built. Debt dependency is reduced. Citizens are served.

  • Pillar and region designation by donor
  • Project selection by constitutional protocol
  • 80 cents of every dollar to infrastructure — constitutional
  • Qualifies for India CSR mandate, SA B-BBEE, EU ESG disclosure
  • Open to corporations and institutional donors
Of the 20% that comes to BRASA — 80% goes to the planet
80% World Maintenance & Insurance

Ocean conservation. Wildlife protection. Climate infrastructure. The global LifeOS insurance pool that covers every citizen on Earth from Day 1. The planet is not a cost centre. It is the beneficiary — receiving its constitutionally guaranteed share of every layer of the protocol.

→
20% BRASA Operations

Technology infrastructure. Legal entity maintenance. The Swiss sovereign structure. Founder and team compensation. The management fee for running the planet’s life insurance policy. Constitutionally capped. Cannot grow. Cannot be redirected.

The Debt Reduction Thesis · Why This Changes Everything

When social programmes are fully funded by the Citizens’ Renaissance Fund, the Sovereign Infrastructure Fund, and the CRF commercial mechanism — governments are freed from the borrowing cycle that social service delivery has always required. The budget that was servicing debt to deliver water can now reduce debt. The country that could never escape its creditors now has a path. Not through austerity. Through a constitutional protocol that funded the services so the treasury did not have to.

Corporate & Individual Donor Tiers
Impact Donor From $100,000 / year

Full tax deductibility. Real-time impact dashboard. Annual cryptographically signed Impact Certificate. Share the dashboard in your ESG disclosure, annual report, and sustainability filing. The numbers are generated by the protocol — not your communications team.

→ brasa.world/impact/{company}
→ Impact Certificate · constitutional
→ Tax deductible · all jurisdictions
Founding Corporate Partner $5M / year · 3-year commitment

Naming rights on specific infrastructure — permanent, constitutional, written into the public ledger at commissioning. Seat on the BRASA Corporate Advisory Council. The BRASA Partner mark for ESG certification. Being first carries the same weight it always has.

→ Permanent infrastructure naming
→ Advisory Council seat
→ BRASA Partner certification mark
Constitutional Benefactor $50M+ commitment

Permanent recognition in the BRASA constitutional record — the founding ledger of the Citizens’ Renaissance, held in the Geneva sovereign structure, unamendable. Class N Share consideration in BRASA’s equity structure. The same record that carries the eleven pillars carries your name.

→ Constitutional record · permanent
→ Class N Share consideration
→ Founding ledger of the Renaissance
Live Impact Dashboard · Every Donor brasa.world/impact/{your-organisation}

Real-time. Constitutional. Generated by the protocol — not by a PR team. Every number verifiable by any auditor, regulator, or shareholder who reads it. No other philanthropic destination on Earth offers this.

80¢ Per dollar to citizens
Real-time Impact tracking
193 Nations covered
∞ Corpus compounds

“The tax break that built a hospital. The donation that ended a nation’s debt cycle. The corporation that funded the water its own employees’ children will drink. When every layer of commerce, government, and philanthropy flows through the same constitutional protocol — the planet maintains itself.”

BRASA CR™ · Citizens’ Renaissance Fund · Sovereign Infrastructure Fund · April 1, 2026
Foundation The Constitutional Foundation +
BRASA Ocean & Wildlife Foundation · Irrevocable Trust · Earth-First

Save the Oceans.
Protect All Life.
Eradicate the Deadliest Animal.

An irrevocable philanthropic trust. 80% of net founder wealth deployed to ocean conservation, cetacean protection, all-creature welfare, and the permanent eradication of Anopheles mosquitoes. A legacy no government, market crash, divorce court, or distant heir can undo.

The 20% operational allocation is not a fee. It is not a platform charge. It is a civilisational investment — reinvested so that when the founder is gone, it continues to provide for the individuals BRASA was built to serve, and for the planet they live on. You owe it to the world you were born into.

The Peter Bailey Principle · BRASA CR · BRASA CR™
🌊
Program I · Ocean Sovereignty Fund

Build what governments won't

71% of Earth is ocean. Almost none is protected. Autonomous deep-sea monitoring networks. Undersea acoustic arrays for cetacean communication mapping. High-seas treaty enforcement technology. Sovereign marine reserves in international waters — independent of any nation's political will.

71% of Earth · <3% protected
🐋
Program II · Cetacean & All-Creature Protection

Every creature. From insects to elephants.

Satellite tagging for whales, dolphins, and orcas. Anti-sonar campaigns. Shipping lane rerouting advocacy. Bycatch elimination technology. Habitat corridor preservation. ~1 million species at risk of extinction this century. Every one of them was here before we were.

~1M species · at risk · this century
🦟
Program III · Eradicate the Deadliest Animal

Not management. Permanent eradication.

Anopheles mosquitoes kill 600,000+ people every year. More than all wars combined. Gene-drive technology, sterile insect release, and CRISPR-based suppression of Anopheles gambiae — co-invested with Gates Foundation malaria programmes and Johns Hopkins MRCI research. The goal is not reduction. It is elimination.

600K deaths/yr · more than all wars combined
80%
Mission Capital · Irrevocable

Transferred at every liquidity event

Invested in a perpetual endowment — 5% annual payout to ocean, wildlife, and mosquito eradication programs. Principal protected forever. No individual, government, or court can access, redirect, or dissolve it. Inspired by Gates Foundation mechanics, adapted for sovereign permanence. Board of 7 independent trustees: 2 marine biologists · 2 epidemiologists · 1 conservation attorney · 1 indigenous ocean stewardship representative · 1 independent auditor.

20%
Personal Sovereignty · Permanent

Yours. Always.

Your security. Your family. Your continued work building BRASA. Can never be clawed back to the trust — structurally protected from mission creep. Permanently yours.

Foundation Corpus · Swiss Investment Account · Geneva

The foundation corpus is held in a Swiss private bank account (Julius Bär, Pictet & Cie, or Lombard Odier — Geneva) under a Panama irrevocable trust structure with international investment mandate. Corpus compounds in Swiss-managed global equity and fixed income. Only the 5% annual return is deployed to the three mission programs. The principal is protected forever — growing every year, paying out every year, for as long as the oceans exist and need defending.

The architecture is the lock. The trust is irrevocable from the moment of signing. No founder, no board, no government, no future version of BRASA can reverse the mission. The oceans will be monitored. The whales will be tagged. The mosquito will be gone. This is what the BRASA CR owes the planet it was built on.

The Taíno Protocol Origin, Mission & Values +
Taíno Protocol — World Memory Bank · Every people · Every truth · Forever

The world’s first constitutional
memory bank for all of humanity.

Every people who were conquered had their history rewritten by the conqueror. Every elder who died without an archive took irreplaceable knowledge with them. Every language that disappeared took a way of understanding the world that cannot be reconstructed. The Taíno Protocol ends this. Not for one people. For all of them. Every voice. Every truth. Every version of history told by the people who lived it. Constitutionally preserved. Permanently protected. Analysed by AI so the world never makes the same catastrophic mistakes again.

Words the Taíno people gave to the world — their language lives in every language on Earth
Barbacoa
Barbecue
Hamaca
Hammock
Hurácan
Hurricane
Canoa
Canoe
Tabaco
Tobacco
Iguana
Iguana
Savana
Savannah
Mani
Peanut
Yuca
Cassava
Bijaí
Annatto
Caiman
Caiman
Guayaba
Guava
01 — Record

Every voice.
Every truth.

Speak into any phone. The Taíno Protocol records, preserves, and constitutionally protects your truth. Your recipe. Your history. Your version of what happened. Not the conqueror’s version. Yours. Cryptographically signed. Append-only. Distributed across five jurisdictions simultaneously. No government can delete it. No corporation can own it. No algorithm can bury it.

02 — Preserve

Every people.
Every language.

The Library of Alexandria burned. The Taíno oral tradition was silenced. The history of every colonised people was rewritten by the colonisers. Every single time it happened because the knowledge lived in one place. The World Memory Bank has no single place. No single controller. 106 languages. 300+ sign languages. Oral delivery for those who cannot write. Every human who has lived has a story worth preserving.

03 — Learn

Every mistake.
Never again.

An elder in Puerto Rico records what 1492 felt like in her grandmother’s grandmother’s stories. An elder in Rwanda records 1994. An elder in Hiroshima records August 6, 1945. An elder in Australia records sixty thousand years. AI analyses the complete archive to find the warning signs that appear before every genocide, every famine, every erasure. The instruction manual for what never to let happen again — written by the people who survived it.

The World Memory Bank — AI analysis layer

Not just a record.
An instruction manual for the future.

The Taíno Protocol collects. The AI analyses. Every pattern that preceded a genocide. Every economic condition that preceded a famine. Every political language that appeared before rights were stripped. Every environmental signal that communities noticed before outsiders did. The world has made the same catastrophic mistakes repeatedly because the warning signs were never compiled, never analysed, never made available to everyone simultaneously. The World Memory Bank changes that. For the first time in history, the accumulated wisdom of every people who ever lived is available to every person alive — in their language, on their phone, in sixty seconds.

“I am Puerto Rican. Part Taíno. The Taíno were the first people Columbus met. Within fifty years, four hundred thousand of them were gone. The history that survived was written by the people who did it. This protocol is named for them because they gave the world barbecue, the hammock, and hurricane — and the world forgot to give them back their story. BRASA gives it back. To them. To every people. To every voice that was silenced before anyone thought to listen.”
Richard Ortiz — Founder, BRASA CR™ · Puerto Rican · Part Taíno · April 1, 2026
WarExclusionOS War Instigators Barred · PeaceOS Enforcement · Constitutional Exclusion · Civilians Protected · Violation Protocol · Peace Dividend +
WarExclusionOS — War Instigators Barred · PeaceOS Enforcement · Constitutional Exclusion · Civilians Protected · Violation Protocol · Peace Dividend

Call it whatever you want.
The constitutional record knows what it is. And BRASA has a rule about it.

🚫

Constitutional Exclusion — No Exceptions

Any government, entity, or individual constitutionally identified as an instigator of armed conflict is excluded from BRASA. No T4 commerce access. No GovID network participation. No Work Freedom Fund. No constitutional supply chain verification. No constitutional employer certification. No constitutional credit access. The benefits of BRASA — every single one — are conditioned on not instigating war. The rule is in the Genesis document. It cannot be negotiated, lobbied, or reinterpreted by any future administration.

📋

The Constitutional Identification Standard

Instigator status is not determined by any single government's declaration — not by the UN Security Council where a veto can block accountability, not by any nation with a political interest in the outcome. It is determined by the constitutional record: JusticeOS civilian harm filings from inside the conflict zone, ConflictFinanceOS arms transaction traces, pattern detection across independent reports, and corroboration through multiple constitutional sources. The government that calls its invasion a special operation faces the same constitutional record as the government that calls it war.

⚡

Violation Protocol — Suspension and Reinstatement

A BRASA member found to have instigated conflict after joining faces immediate constitutional suspension. T4 commerce routes frozen. Work Freedom Fund contribution suspended. Constitutional suspension record sealed permanently. Reinstatement requires three things simultaneously: independent constitutional review confirming cessation, full reparations payment to documented civilian victims through the ReparationsOS fund, and verified cessation confirmed by the constitutional record — not by self-declaration, not by allies, not by a press conference. By the record.

🛡️

Civilians Always Protected — The Government Is Excluded, Not The People

The constitutional exclusion applies to governments and instigating entities. Never to civilian populations. The citizens of an excluded government retain their individual GovIDs fully active. Their T4 Wallets remain operational. Their constitutional health records, land titles, employment protections, Work Freedom dividend — all continue. The government is excluded. The people are not. The soldier who files a JusticeOS civilian harm record from inside the conflict is protected by the same constitutional infrastructure as the civilian they are documenting. BRASA does not punish populations for their governments.

☮️

PeaceOS — Economic Incentive Built Into The Architecture

Communities that maintain documented conflict-free periods — verified by the absence of JusticeOS civilian harm records and the presence of constitutional economic activity — earn constitutional peace dividends paid via T4 to every GovID in the peace zone. The economic signal that peace generates constitutional income and war generates constitutional exclusion is built into the architecture simultaneously. Not as a separate peace program. As the same constitutional mechanism applied from both directions. Peace pays. War costs access to everything BRASA provides.

🌍

The Pressure That Makes It Work

A government that wants its corporations to access the constitutional commerce network must not be an identified instigator. A government that wants its citizens to receive the Work Freedom dividend through constitutional channels must not be an identified instigator. A government that wants constitutional supply chain verification, constitutional credit access, constitutional employer certification for its business community must not be an identified instigator. The incentive to maintain peace is not moral. It is constitutional and financial. The cost of war is exclusion from the largest economic network ever built.

☮️
PeaceBot — war exclusion and PeaceOS enforcement guide in any language
War instigators barred · Civilians protected · Violation protocol · Peace dividend · Constitutional identification
